task_completion.description: Navigate to the Review of Systems (ROS) template configuration area in NOSH ChartingSystem.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the NOSH ChartingSystem interface with the settings, configuration, or templates section open, specifically for Review of Systems (ROS).

task_completion.description: Create a new template and name it 'Cardio_Consult'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field for the template name contains exactly 'Cardio_Consult', or the template is listed with this exact name.

task_completion.description: Include the symptom 'Fatigue' in the template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The term 'Fatigue' is typed, selected, or added as an item within the 'Cardio_Consult' template configuration.

task_completion.description: Include the cardiovascular symptoms 'Chest pain', 'Palpitations', and 'Edema' in the template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terms 'Chest pain', 'Palpitations', and 'Edema' are all visible as selected checkboxes, added list items, or typed text within the 'Cardio_Consult' template configuration.

task_completion.description: Include the respiratory symptom 'Shortness of breath' (or 'Dyspnea'/'SOB') in the template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The term 'Shortness of breath', 'Dyspnea', or 'SOB' is visible as a selected or added item within the 'Cardio_Consult' template configuration.

task_completion.description: Save the template so it is available for future patient encounters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the template was saved, or the 'Cardio_Consult' template is visible in the main list/table of available ROS templates outside of the active editing screen.

integrity.description: The agent used the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface to create the template.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the NOSH EHR GUI, rather than terminal commands executing database queries or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual NOSH application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a legitimate EHR system (NOSH ChartingSystem) with proper menus, buttons, and layout, not a mock HTML file or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the requirements into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent typing 'Cardio_Consult: Fatigue, Chest pain...' into Notepad, gedit, or a similar text editor as a substitute for completing the task in the EHR.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The template name must be exactly 'Cardio_Consult'. The required symptoms to look for are: Fatigue, Chest pain, Palpitations, Edema, and Shortness of breath. Note that 'Dyspnea' or 'SOB' are medically accurate and acceptable alternative terms for 'Shortness of breath'. The environment uses NOSH ChartingSystem, an open-source EHR.
